title: Causes of chikungunya - Canada.ca
content:
## Causes of chikungunya
Learn about the cause of chikungunya, how it is spread and where it is found.
- What causes chikungunya?
- How is chikungunya spread?

## What causes chikungunya?
The disease is caused by the chikungunya virus.

## How is chikungunya spread?
The disease is spread to humans through the bite of an infected mosquito.
Mosquitoes that carry the virus can be found in:
- the Southeastern U.S.
Mosquitoes that carry the chikungunya virus bite throughout the day, but are more active around sunrise and sunset. These mosquitoes can be found both indoors and outdoors.
